{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"8","subject":"Create content planning documents","description":"Create content planning docs in docs/articles/ directory:

1. docs/articles/01-replace-openclaw-heartbeat.md - Article outline: what OpenClaw heartbeat does, how Freeloader replaces it, migration guide, config comparison
2. docs/articles/02-freeloader-for-claude-code.md - Set OPENAI_BASE_URL, use free models for routine tasks, trust tiers for code vs docs
3. docs/articles/03-freeloader-for-langchain.md - Configure ChatOpenAI with Freeloader, auto model selection, cost tracking per chain
4. docs/articles/04-freeloader-for-ide-tools.md - IDE integration (Cursor/Continue/Copilot), best models for code completion, free tier optimization
5. docs/articles/05-freeloader-for-vercel-ai.md - Next.js AI chatbot with $0 backend, streaming, per-user budgets
6. docs/articles/06-top-50-llm-tools.md - Research and categorize by Freeloader compatibility (IDE Assistants, Agent Frameworks, Chat UIs, Dev Tools, RAG/Search, Automation, Content, Voice)
7. docs/articles/07-zero-dollar-ai-stack.md - Tutorial script: $200/mo→$0, install in 30s, configure 5 providers in 2min, run 100 requests, tips & tricks (Gemini Gambit, Groq Express, Cerebras Speedrun, Local Lockdown)","assignedBy":"content-dev","timestamp":"2026-03-09T02:41:00.102Z"}
